title: Salty Chewy Middle Eastern Lentils Tagine
description: A hearty, comforting, and easy-to-make vegetarian-friendly Middle Eastern dish, featuring ground ginger and kneaded texture. Perfect for meal prep.

ingredients.name: Red or Brown Lentils
ingredients.amount: 1 cup dried lentils, rinsed and drained

instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the ginger and garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cumin, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the lentils, apricots, and water to the saucepan.
Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Uncover and continue to cook for 10-15 minutes, or until the lentils have absorbed most of the liquid and have a chewy texture.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
